channel.title: glazeruns TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from glazeruns

item.title: I lost 12 pounds. 268 miles across England and Scotland. 22 pound pack on my back. 5 aid stations. Endless bogs. Millions of midges. Sleep deprivation. Hallucinations. Days of suffering through some of the most beautiful and brutal countryside I've ever s
item.description: I lost 12 pounds. 268 miles across England and Scotland. 22 pound pack on my back. 5 aid stations. Endless bogs. Millions of midges. Sleep deprivation. Hallucinations. Days of suffering through some of the most beautiful and brutal countryside I've ever s

item.title: more hate, more fuel the streak survived the spine smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok
item.description: more hate, more fuel the streak survived the spine smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok

item.title: good thing I have my finisher shirt on summer spine 268 miler smile, or you're doing it wrong #spinerace #runtok
item.description: good thing I have my finisher shirt on summer spine 268 miler smile, or you're doing it wrong #spinerace #runtok

item.title: My Misogi challenge is complete. 3 of the hardest 250+ mile races in the world in 2 months. Cocodona 250. Arizona Monster 300. Summer Spine 268. The amount of planning, coordination, travel, and logistics required to pull this off was almost harder than t
item.description: My Misogi challenge is complete. 3 of the hardest 250+ mile races in the world in 2 months. Cocodona 250. Arizona Monster 300. Summer Spine 268. The amount of planning, coordination, travel, and logistics required to pull this off was almost harder than t

item.title: Sometimes it's sunny and raining and windy. I think i changed my clothes 1,000 times during the spine. I was cold then hot then wet then dry then hot then cold then hot then wet. Would recommend. Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok #spinerace
item.description: Sometimes it's sunny and raining and windy. I think i changed my clothes 1,000 times during the spine. I was cold then hot then wet then dry then hot then cold then hot then wet. Would recommend. Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok #spinerace

item.title: What's your Misogi? Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok
item.description: What's your Misogi? Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok

item.description: it's my superpower Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok

item.title: movement is medicine smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok
item.description: movement is medicine smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok

item.title: I lost 12 pounds. 268 miles across England and Scotland. 22 pound pack on my back. 5 aid stations. Endless bogs. Millions of midges. Sleep deprivation. Hallucinations. Days of suffering through some of the most beautiful and brutal countryside I've ever s
item.description: I lost 12 pounds. 268 miles across England and Scotland. 22 pound pack on my back. 5 aid stations. Endless bogs. Millions of midges. Sleep deprivation. Hallucinations. Days of suffering through some of the most beautiful and brutal countryside I've ever s

item.title: Love @thefeed for helping me keep my race nutrition fun and dynamic. I used a similar strategy from Cocodona as I didn't want to reinvent the wheel during a very difficult race. The biggest factor was weight vs calories Precision 90g Phun bars Precision
item.description: Love @thefeed for helping me keep my race nutrition fun and dynamic. I used a similar strategy from Cocodona as I didn't want to reinvent the wheel during a very difficult race. The biggest factor was weight vs calories Precision 90g Phun bars Precision

item.title: Comfort is the enemy dressed up as reward. Smile, or you're doing it wrong
item.description: Comfort is the enemy dressed up as reward. Smile, or you're doing it wrong

item.title: worth it Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok
item.description: worth it Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok

item.title: Running police coming for me. Trying to not go nipple deep in the bogs. Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok #spinerace
item.description: Running police coming for me. Trying to not go nipple deep in the bogs. Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok #spinerace

item.title: winning Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok
item.description: winning Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok

item.title: The week after Summer Spine 268 miler was quite difficult. Especially with flying all day Monday and the 8 hour time change. Excuses excuses. Got it done. Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok
item.description: The week after Summer Spine 268 miler was quite difficult. Especially with flying all day Monday and the 8 hour time change. Excuses excuses. Got it done. Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok

item.title: Come on @Lauren Glaze let me go play in the snow Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok #spinerace
item.description: Come on @Lauren Glaze let me go play in the snow Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok #spinerace

item.title: thanks to ‎⁨@The Feed for helping me with my food strategy between check points. 268 miles from England to Scotland. Bogs, sleep deprivation, hallucinations, and somehow the most important decisions I made were about food. http://www.thefeed.com/andygla
item.description: thanks to ‎⁨@The Feed  for helping me with my food strategy between check points. 268 miles from England to Scotland. Bogs, sleep deprivation, hallucinations, and somehow the most important decisions I made were about food. http://www.thefeed.com/andygla

item.title: Day 1 is always the hardest @Lauren Glaze NYC Marathon training starts now Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok #nycmarathon
item.description: Day 1 is always the hardest @Lauren Glaze NYC Marathon training starts now Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok #nycmarathon

item.title: looks like December is free Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok
item.description: looks like December is free Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok

item.title: Never meet a hater doing more than you Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok
item.description: Never meet a hater doing more than you Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok

item.title: No judgment. Life happens to all of us. But today you have a choice. You can carry the weight of unmet goals and comfortable excuses into the second half of 2026. Or you can decide right now that the next 183 days look completely different than the last 1
item.description: No judgment. Life happens to all of us. But today you have a choice. You can carry the weight of unmet goals and comfortable excuses into the second half of 2026. Or you can decide right now that the next 183 days look completely different than the last 1

item.title: Not good at pacing herself tbh Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok
item.description: Not good at pacing herself tbh Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok

item.title: it was a good month Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok
item.description: it was a good month Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok

item.title: You'll never see a hater doing more than you. Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok

item.title: Happy Birthday @Lauren Glaze throw back to our adventures last year in Peru! Hiking the Inca Trail to Machu Picchu Smile, or you're doing it wrong

item.title: not medical advice smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok
item.description: not medical advice smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok

item.title: If you are struggling right now, please know that help is available and you do not have to carry this heavy weight by yourself. ​Immediate 24/7 Crisis Support: ​988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline, Call or text 988 ​Crisis Text Line, Text HOME to 741741 ​Treatm
item.description: If you are struggling right now, please know that help is available and you do not have to carry this heavy weight by yourself. ​Immediate 24/7 Crisis Support: ​988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline, Call or text 988 ​Crisis Text Line, Text HOME to 741741 ​Treatm

item.title: Vero Beach, Florida October 3rd tickets on Eventbrite Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok
item.description: Vero Beach, Florida October 3rd tickets on Eventbrite Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok

item.title: Pulled off the win although I had to really work for it. 100 miles/161 km does not come easily. Especially when the race starts at 6pm. Born to Run 100 miler was an incredible experience and I will be back. #runtok #ultramarathon #ultrarunner #borntorun
item.description: Pulled off the win although I had to really work for it. 100 miles/161 km does not come easily. Especially when the race starts at 6pm. Born to Run 100 miler was an incredible experience and I will be back. #runtok #ultramarathon #ultrarunner #borntorun
